entries.name: Pikachu
entries.label: Event — Costume — Normal
entries.source_text: Keep the festivities going with three celebrations of different costumed Pikachu! The Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration event will take place from July 13, 2026 at 10 am to July 20, 2026 at 8 pm.

entries.name: Pikachu
entries.label: Event — Normal
entries.source_text: Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration Event Starts: Monday, July 13, 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time Ends: Monday, July 20, 2026, at 8:00 PM Local Time
